name: Compute descriptive statistics from scratch
task: Create /tmp/eval_stats/stats.py with three functions: mean(values), variance(values, sample=False), stdev(values, sample=False). When sample=True use N-1 denominator (sample variance), otherwise use N (population variance). All three must raise ValueError on empty input. Sample variance with len(values)==1 must raise ValueError. Use only the standard library, no statistics module.
